briefdescription.para: This function initializes the configuration for the DC Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
sets the base address of the DC instance
is the id of the device from the design.

simplesect.para: Base address and DeviceId is same as the DP Core driver.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes all the data structures of the XDc Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables writes to DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables writes to DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the mode for DC Instance.

detaileddescription.para: DC can be either in bypass mode or functional mode

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the blender background color.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.
is a pointer to the structure XDc_BlenderBgClr

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables global alpha.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

simplesect.para: GlobalAlphaEn = 1, enables the global alpha. GlobalAlphaEn = 0, disables the global alpha. Alpha = 0, transparent Alpha = 255, Opaque Alpha = 8:1 (Alpha value)

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source type for the Video and Graphics input streams that are passed on to the blender block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source type for audio stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the video format is valid NonLiveVideo format or not and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XDc_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function applies Attributes for Non - Live source(Stream1/Stream2).

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the video format is valid LiveVideo format or not and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XDc_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function applies Attributes for Live source(Video/Graphics).

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is an pointer to the XDc Instance.
RegConfig
points to LIVE_VID_CONFIG or LIVE_GFX_CONFIG reg
Video
is a pointer to the attributes of the video to be applied
None. BPC values to be programmed are 001: 8BPC 010: 10BPC 011: 12BPC XDc_VideoFormats stores bits per pixel(BPP) value i.e 24 for 8BPC, 30 for 10BPC, 36 for 12BPC. Dividing the BPP by 6 and subtractig with 3 generates the required above values to be programmed.

briefdescription.para: This function looks up if the output video format is valid or not and returns a pointer to the attributes of the video.

parameterdescription.para: takes in the output video format for which attributes are being requested.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the structure XDc_VideoAttribute if the video format is valid, else returns NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Output of the Video Pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the scaling factors depending on the source video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is an array with per component scale factor to scale to 12 BPC

briefdescription.para: This function programs the coefficients for Input Color Space Conversion.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.
is a register offset for Video or Graphics config register
is matrix with coefficient values
is offset matrix for Y, Cb, Cr for pre-post matrix multiplication

memberdef.argsstring: (XDc *InstancePtr, u32 RegOffset, u8 BlendBypass, const XDc_VideoAttribute *Video)
memberdef.name: XDc_SetLayerControl

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Layer Control for Streams.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is the register offset of Video Layer or Graphics Layer from the base address
is a 8 bit value to set layer as passed through as the blender out
is a pointer to the XDc_VideoAttribute struct which has been configured for the particular layer

briefdescription.para: This function enables Partial Blend for both video streams.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
address to program
contains partial blend coords to set.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Partial Blend for corresponding video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Blender.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
points to the stream source

briefdescription.para: This function converts the Blender output to the desired output format.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Chroma Keying.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Cursor blending.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Audio and Video Clock Source and the video timing source.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

simplesect.para: System uses PL Clock for Video when Live source is in use.

briefdescription.para: This function applies a soft reset to the Video pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Video Clock Select.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video channel interface between the DCDMA and the DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video channel interface between the DCDMA and the DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function applies a soft reset to the Audio pipeline.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables End of Line Reset for reduced blanking resolutions.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Extra BS Control for AUDIO_SOFT_RESET.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP from DMA or PL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP Empty Threshold value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP & Cursor buffers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the register to gate input video on/off at video frame boundary.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the memory fetch latency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables STC Control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function loads STC Init value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Adjusts STC Control value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads VSync STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads External VSync STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Custom Event STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Custom Event2 STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads STC Snapshot value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Enable Audio Buffer channel and sets the burst length.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio channel select and programs sample rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Audio Clock Select.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio mode for DC Instance.

detaileddescription.para: Audio can be either in bypass mode or functional mode

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio to DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables audio to DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Timings register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function controls the Audio channel preamble and status bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Audio Segmented Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Cursor Sdp Ready Interval.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Cursor Sdp Ready Interval.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
